But for simplicity we can add two separate lines: one for b64 and one for b32. Since scanning may expect those.

For auditctl: add to /etc/audit/audit.rules same two lines. After editing, reload auditd: run auditctl -R /etc/audit/audit.rules. /etc/audit/rules.d not used, but you can reload with dupload? Keep simple.
